messages.content:
You have a Power app that use a Power Automate flow to run a Microsoft Azure Logic App.

What should you do?

Select only one answer.

Export the Azure Logic App as a custom connector.

Create an Azure Data Lake.

Create an Azure Logic App portal.

Create an Azure Service Bus instance.
Export the Azure Logic App as a custom connector.

You are designing a Power Apps web portal. You want to provide customers the ability to add or review requests for service.

You create a table to store the data. You need to define the list of attributes for the table.

What are two ways to define the list? Each correct answer presents a complete solution.

Select all answers that apply.

comma-separated list

asterisk

https://

slash-separated list
comma-separated list and slash-separated list.

Which three operations are supported by the Power Apps portal Web API? Each correct answer presents a complete solution.

Select all answers that apply.

Create records

Delete records

Associate records

Use actions

Execute batch operations
Create records, Delete records, and Associate records.

You are creating forms. You must design a form to display data on a small display.

Which type of form should you create?

Select only one answer.

Card

Main

Quick Create

Quick view
Card.

You are developing a model-driven app form.

Which control type allows users to modify data on a related record without requiring additional code or configuration?

Select only one answer.

Lookup

Power Apps component framework (PCF)

Embedded canvas app

Form component
Lookup.

You create a form in the order table within Microsoft Dataverse. You assign the salespeople security group access to the form.

The form displays for users not assigned to the form.

What are two reasons the form displays to non-assigned users? Each correct answer presents a complete solution.

Select all answers that apply.

This form is the only form in the order table.

The Enabled for fallback setting has been enabled.

The form is first in form order within the order table.

The form order has the form as the first form available.
The Enabled for fallback setting has been enabled and The form order has the form as the first form available.

You plan to change the format of product numbers for a company. You create a plug-in to format the product numbers.

When you create new products, the product numbers are formatted correctly.

You need to format all existing product numbers.

Which two actions should you perform? Each correct answer presents a complete solution.

Select all answers that apply.

Manually edit product numbers and save for each record.

Run a power automate flow to update and save each record.

Add a step to the plug-in to update each existing record.

Add a format formula to the column.
Add a step to the plug-in to update each existing record and Run a power automate flow to update and save each record.

From which class is a custom workflow extension’s Execute method derived?

Select only one answer.

IPlugin

IPluginExecutionContext

IWorkflowContext

CodeActivity
CodeActivity.

You create a plug-in that calculates a price when the system saves product records.

You need to register the plug-in.

With which event pipeline stage should you associate the plug-in?

Select only one answer.

Pre-Operation

MainOperation

Pre-validation

Post-operation
Pre-Operation.

You implement a plug-in that formats five columns when saving a record. Editing and saving records is significantly slower after implementing the plug-in.

You need to troubleshoot the plug-in.

Which tool should you use?

Select only one answer.

Data Export Services

Data Policies

Microsoft Dataverse Analytics

Microsoft Azure Application Insights
Microsoft Azure Application Insights.

You are creating a Power Apps component framework control.

Which method should you use to raise events to the host?

Select only one answer.

notifyOutputChanged

getOutputs

destroy

updateView
notifyOutputChanged.

Which three functions does the Microsoft Power Platform Command Line Interface (CLI) provide when developing Power Apps component framework controls? Each correct answer presents a complete solution.

Select all answers that apply.

Initialize a new project.

Create a new solution to contain the controls.

Deploy to an environment.

Publish on App Source.

Prepare code for source control by converting code to XML files.
Initialize a new project, Create a new solution to contain the controls, and Deploy to an environment.

You create meetings for an entire year. You store the meetings in the Schedule table.

When a user opens the meeting attendance form, all meetings must be listed on the Microsoft Dataverse form.

You need to add code to process the form events.

Which code segment should you use?

Select only one answer.

addOnPreProcessStatusChange

formContext.data.isValid()

formContext.data.entity.addOnSave(myFunction)

formContext.data.addOnLoad(myFunction)

formContext.data.removeOnLoad(myFunction)
formContext.data.addOnLoad(myFunction)

You are using the form editor user interface to register a new JavaScript event handler. The event handler must execute business logic when a field value changes.

The code produces an error when trying to retrieve the formContext object by using the getFormContext method.

What is the cause of the error?

Select only one answer.

The event was registered on the incorrect field.

The function name was spelled incorrectly.

The enabled button was not checked.

Your function does not accept any parameters.
Your function does not accept any parameters.

A company develops a custom application and develops an API for accessing the application.

You are developing a custom connector for a canvas app.

You need to ensure that the canvas app can retrieve account information from the API.

Which two types of files can you use? Each correct answer presents a complete solution.

Select all answers that apply.

Postman collection

Open API definition

SOAP

XML
Postman collection and Open API definition.

You evaluate an integration with a Microsoft Azure Service Bus instance by using a service endpoint and SAS key authentication.

You register a service endpoint step to send contact records to the Azure Service Bus instance when records are deleted. You deploy all components to a new environment.

You need update the SAS key.

Where should you update the SAS key?

Select only one answer.

Environment variable

Secure configuration of the service endpoint step

Azure Service Bus shared access policies

Service endpoint registration
Secure configuration of the service endpoint step.

You are creating an integration to transfer data between Microsoft Dataverse and a third-party system. You create a Microsoft Azure Service Bus queue to expose the Dataverse data.

You need to configure publishing of Dataverse data to the Azure Service Bus queue.

What should you register?

Select only one answer.

Assembly

Webhook

Service Endpoint

Data Provider
Service Endpoint.

You are registering a webhook to push Microsoft Dataverse information to a third-party application.

Which three authentication types can you use? Each correct answer presents a complete solution.

Select all answers that apply.

HttpHeader

OAuth 2.0

HttpQueryString

API Key

WebhookKey
HttpHeader, OAuth 2.0, and API Key.

You develop a Microsoft Azure Function to process Microsoft Dataverse webhook requests.

You must update the code to manage requests generated from different tables and different events.

Which two objects will contain the table and event names? Each correct answer presents a complete solution.

Select all answers that apply.

Message body

Message headers

Query string

HTTP trigger
Message body and Message headers.

You develop a Microsoft Azure Function to process Microsoft Dataverse events. Data must only be sent to the function when an account is updated to a specific status.

Which method should you use to call the Azure Function?

Select only one answer.

Webhook

Azure-aware plug-in

Service Endpoint using an Azure Service Bus Queue

Service Endpoint using an Azure Event Hub
Service Endpoint using an Azure Service Bus Queue.

You have a Power app that use a Power Automate flow to run a Microsoft Azure Logic App.

What should you do?

Select only one answer.

Export the Azure Logic App as a custom connector.

Create an Azure Data Lake.

Create an Azure Logic App portal.

Create an Azure Service Bus instance.
Export the Azure Logic App as a custom connector.

Which three operations are supported by the Power Apps portal Web API? Each correct answer presents a complete solution.

Select all answers that apply.

Create records

Delete records

Associate records

Use actions

Execute batch operations
Create records, Delete records, and Associate records.

You create a form in the order table within Microsoft Dataverse. You assign the salespeople security group access to the form.

The form displays for users not assigned to the form.

What are two reasons the form displays to non-assigned users? Each correct answer presents a complete solution.

Select all answers that apply.

This form is the only form in the order table.

The Enabled for fallback setting has been enabled.

The form is first in form order within the order table.

The form order has the form as the first form available.
The Enabled for fallback setting has been enabled and The form order has the form as the first form available.

You are creating a model-driven app that uses standard tables for customer records.

The company uses a Microsoft SQL Server-based on-premises system for its general ledger, accounts payable, and accounts receivable functions.

The app must be able to view and perform calculations based on the discount agreements that the company has with its customers.

What should you recommend?

Select only one answer.

Use a SQL gateway with virtual tables.

Use dual-write to map to the tables.

Use a REST API with a custom connector.

Implement Dynamics 365 Finance.
Use dual-write to map to the tables.
why

Dual-write is a Microsoft Dynamics 365 feature that integrates customer engagement apps with finance and operations apps by synchronizing data. It is designed to automate the flow of data between Dynamics 365 apps and the on-premises Microsoft Dynamics ERP systems. This integration provides a seamless experience for business users to run their businesses between both systems without having to manually synchronize the data. Therefore, in this case, you can recommend using dual-write to map to the tables in the on-premises Microsoft SQL Server to view and perform calculations based on the discount agreements that the company has with its customers.

You are creating a model-driven app that uses standard tables for customer records.

You need to recommend a ready-to-use secure contract signature solution.

What should you recommend?

Select only one answer.

GitHub

AppSource

Azure DevOps

Azure Marketplace
AppSource.

A company leases measuring equipment for customers in the chemical field. The order fulfillment process requires specialized knowledge and tools. Employees working from two warehouses manage customer and order data. Remote employees require access to technical details about customer orders.

The orders can include multiple pieces of equipment and additional items, such as specialized modules and installation services.

You are developing the data model for a Microsoft Power Platform solution to replace existing systems.

Which set of tables should you recommend?

Select only one answer.

Accounts, Main equipment, Additional items

Accounts, Main equipment, Modules, and Services

Counts, Modules, and Services

Customers, Products, and Services
Customers, Products, and Services.

You are gathering requirements for a new project.

One of the requirements regarding a business process is unclear.

You need to clarify the requirement.

Which question should you ask to clarify the requirement?

Select only one answer.

Who needs the requirement?

Is the need solved by the requirement?

Which team issued the requirement?

What are the details of the business process?

How achievable is the requirement?
What are the details of the business process?

You are designing a Microsoft Power Platform solution for a company.

The company needs many different requirements developed and released over time.

You need to ensure that you meet the initial release requirements by using the business objectives.

Which process should you use?

Select only one answer.

Epic

Fork

Minimum viable product

User acceptance testing
Minimum viable product.

You are deploying Microsoft Power Platform apps for a bank.

The new apps reside in five development environments: three quality assurance (QA) and two staging environments. The apps are then moved to the production environment.

What should you use to manage the lifecycle of the apps?

Select only one answer.

Microsoft Power Platform Tool Installer

Microsoft Power Platform Build Tools

Azure DevOps with PowerShell

Microsoft Power Platform CLI
Azure DevOps with PowerShell.

A development team at a company is creating a set of integrated features. Another team is creating a separate set of integrated features. The company follows Microsoft best practice for Application Lifecycle Management (ALM).

The user acceptance testing (UAT) team needs a separate environment to test development work from both teams before moving features into production.

How many environments will the company have once the company provisions environments to meet the requirements?

Select only one answer.

Two

Three

Four

Five
Four.

A company accumulates hundreds of identically formatted Microsoft Excel worksheets containing customer data.

You merge all the data into a single worksheet. Users experience performance issues when using the merged worksheet.

You need to improve performance. You import the worksheet into a custom table in Microsoft Dataverse.

Which solution should you use to improve performance?

Select only one answer.

Custom Dataverse table with Dataverse search enabled.

Custom Dataverse table with Azure Cognitive Search enabled.

Azure Blog Storage referencing a Dataverse virtual table.

Power BI workspace referencing an Azure Table Storage custom table.

Dataverse custom table referenced in a Power BI workspace referencing a Dataverse custom table.
Custom Dataverse table with Azure Cognitive Search enabled.

A company needs to create a Microsoft Power Platform app. The app will manage sensitive information about employees.

The app must provide employee information only to the employee’s immediate manager and that person’s manager. If an employee transfers to a different division, access transfers to the employee's new manager and that person's manager.

Which security model should you recommend?

Select only one answer.

Business unit

Row level

Manager hierarchy

Position hierarchy

Team owned
Manager hierarchy.

A company plans to make historical communications available in Microsoft Dataverse after importing customer records into Microsoft Power Platform.

Most communications are with customers and exist in Microsoft Dataverse as contact records. The historical data is stored in an existing SQL repository.

You need to collect the communications generated by customers.

What should you do?

Select only one answer.

Import the historical records into the activity tables, linking them to the employee’s customer record.

Import the historical records into a custom table, linking them to employee records.

Create a virtual entity for the communications connected to the SQL repository.

Import the historical records into a custom table that has a n-1 relationship to the contact table.

Import the historical records into a custom table that has a n-1 relationship to the account table.
Import the historical records into the activity tables, linking them to the employee’s customer record.

You are creating a model-driven app for wedding planning. You have a Microsoft Excel workbook that contains email addresses and other contact information. The Excel data will be imported and used to send wedding invitations from the model-driven app through email.

A wedding planner will request musical group bids and select the top three bids. The wedding planner will assign tasks for specific wedding party members to complete. Wedding party members with tasks will have access to the model-driven app.

You need to create a custom table to manage some of the data.

Which data type requires the custom table?

Select only one answer.

Musical group bids

Invitation responses

Wedding party assignments

Guest names
Wedding party assignments.

You are developing a Microsoft Power Platform solution.

The data diagram has a large amount of information about the tables and their connections that makes it hard to use effectively.

What should you remove?

Select only one answer.

Custom relationships to standard tables

Standard relationships to standard tables

Custom relationships to custom tables

Standard relationships to custom tables
Custom relationships to standard tables.

You need to design a solution to copy data from an accounting system into Microsoft Dataverse when data in the accounting system is updated by users.

Which two design patterns should you recommend? Each answer presents part of the solution.

Select all answers that apply.

Change tracking

System jobs

Alternate keys

Upsert

Server-side synchronization
Change tracking and System jobs.

You are developing a Power Apps app that processes sales transactions for a company’s conference exhibitor booth.

The app must interact with the company’s cloud-based ERP system to post submitted orders. The app must check a customer’s credit limit when starting a new order.

Which event framework stage should you recommend?

Select only one answer.

PreOperation

PreValidation

MainOperation

PostOperation
PreValidation.

You are designing an app to collect votes for a county government election. The vote results will be captured in Microsoft Dataverse and need to be transferred to a custom location.

The app must process votes reliably.

What should you recommend?

Select only one answer.

Azure Service Bus

Webhooks

Instant cloud flow

Classic workflow

Scheduled cloud flow
Azure Service Bus.

An employee downloads product inquiries from the company’s website nightly and saves the data as a comma delimited file in Microsoft Teams.

You need to make the product inquiry data available from within a model-driven app. The product inquiry data will be maintained in the model-driven app.

What should you recommend?

Select only one answer.

Virtual entity

Custom connection

Power Automate flow

Azure Service Bus
Power Automate flow.
why

To make the product inquiry data available from within a model-driven app, we can recommend using the Power Automate flow. We can suggest the following steps to accomplish this:
- Create a new Power Automate flow that runs every night.
- Add a trigger to this flow that fires when a new file is created in the Microsoft Teams folder containing the product inquiry data.
- Use the Excel Online (Business) connector to read the product inquiry data from the downloaded file.
- Implement the Dataverse connector in Power Automate flow to store the downloaded data into Microsoft Dataverse.
- Use the Dataverse connector in Power Automate flow to create a custom entity, and map the columns from the Excel Online data to the entity in Dataverse. In this way, product inquiry data will be maintained in the model-driven app. 

Therefore, using Power Automate flow is the best approach for this requirement to make the product inquiry data available from within a model-driven app.
